description: Functionality for supporting user-interfaces and presentation.

LayoutLocationAbsolute.description: Positions a component edge on the screen at a location from -1.0 to +1.0.

value.name: Value
value.description: Location of this component edge in absolute screen space from -1.0 to +1.0.

LayoutLocationRelative.description: Positions a component edge on the screen at a location relative to another component.

value.name: Value
value.description: Location of this component edge in absolute screen space from -1.0 to +1.0.

relative.name: Relative
relative.description: Component to which this edge is connected.

LayoutOffsetAbsolute.description: Offset a component edge using an absolute value, where the screen height is 2.0 (-1.0 to +1.0).

value.name: Value
value.description: Value of this component edge as an offset from the edge of the screen, from -1.0 to +1.0 on the vertical axis, and values depending on screen aspect ratio on the horizontal axis.

LayoutOffsetLinked.description: Offset a component edge by an amount proportional to the dimension of another component.

Orientation.name: Orientation
Orientation.description: Orientation of the linked component to use.

linked.name: Linked To
linked.description: The component to which this component edge offset is linked.

ratio.name: Ratio
ratio.description: The value of this component edge offset, where -1.0 is the top or left of the linked component, and +1.0 is the bottom or right of the linked component.

MenuItemAction.description: A menu item that shows a label and performs an action when selected.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

onSelection.name: On Selection
onSelection.description: Action to perform upon selecting this action menu item.

MenuItemBoolean.description: A menu item that can be toggled between two states.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

trueLabel.name: True Label
trueLabel.description: Label to be shown as the value of this boolean menu item when set to true.

falseLabel.name: False Label
falseLabel.description: Label to be shown as the value of this boolean menu item when set to false.

MenuItemDigitalInput.description: A menu item that allows a digital input to be configured.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

MenuItemDisplayResolution.description: A menu item that allows a display configuration to be selected.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

MenuItemFileList.description: A menu item that allows a file to be selected from a list.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

folder.name: Folder
folder.description: Folder from which to list files in this menu.

user.name: User Folder
user.description: Determine whether the folder is relative to program data or user data.

onSelection.name: On Selection
onSelection.description: Action to perform upon selecting a file.

MenuItemLauncherList.description: A menu item that allows a application launcher to be selected from a list.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

onSelection.name: On Selection
onSelection.description: Action to perform upon selecting an application launcher.

MenuItemSlider.description: A menu item that allows a value to be adjusted by a slider.

id.name: ID
id.description: Unique identifier of this menu item.

minimum.name: Minimum
minimum.description: The minimum value of this slider.

maximum.name: Maximum
maximum.description: The maximum value of this slider.

steps.name: Steps
steps.description: The number of steps it takes to traverse from the minimum value of this slider to the maximum value.

onChange.name: On Change
onChange.description: Action to perform upon changing the value of this slider.

ScreenGradient.description: A visual component that renders a rectangle that fades from a colour on one side to another colour on the other side.

colourA.name: Colour A
colourA.description: Colour at the start of the gradient.

colourB.name: Colour B
colourB.description: Colour at the end of the gradient.

orientation.name: Orientation
orientation.description: Orientation of the gradient.  This can be used to create vertical or horizontal gradients.

ScreenModel.description: A visual component that renders a model.

ScreenPanel.description: A visual component that renders a rounded rectangle.

cornerSize.name: Corner Size
cornerSize.description: Size of the corners of the panel.

ScreenText.description: A visual component that renders text.

font.name: Font
font.description: Font to use for rendering the text.

shadowOffset.name: Shadow Offset
shadowOffset.description: Offset of the shadow rendered behind the text.

StringTime.description: Converts a millisecond value into a formatted time string.

value.name: Value
value.description: Value to convert to a time string.

format.name: Format String
format.description: Format string to use for the time string.

Layout.description: Combine and arrange multiple visual elements on a single screen.  Each visual element of the layout can be switched programmatically.

Content.name: Content
Content.description: Edit the content of this layout.

ComponentName.name: Name
ComponentName.description: Name of this component.  The name is only used when interacting with this component programmatically.

left.name: Left
left.description: Position for the left edge of this component.  Note this can also be adjusted in the editor.

right.name: Right
right.description: Position for the right edge of this component.  Note this can also be adjusted in the editor.

top.name: Top
top.description: Position for the top edge of this component.  Note this can also be adjusted in the editor.

bottom.name: Bottom
bottom.description: Position for the bottom edge of this component.  Note this can also be adjusted in the editor.

offset.name: Offset
offset.description: Offset of this component edge from its location.

LayoutLocationAbsolutevalue.name: Value
LayoutLocationAbsolutevalue.description: Location of this component edge in absolute screen space from -1.0 to +1.0.

LayoutLocationRelativevalue.name: Value
LayoutLocationRelativevalue.description: Location of this component edge from to the selected relative component.

LayoutLocationRelativerelative.name: Relative
LayoutLocationRelativerelative.description: Component to which this edge is connected.

LayoutOffsetAbsolutevalue.name: Value
LayoutOffsetAbsolutevalue.description: Value of this component edge as an offset from the edge of the screen, from -1.0 to +1.0 on the vertical axis, and values depending on screen aspect ratio on the horizontal axis.

LayoutOffsetLinkedOrientation.name: Orientation
LayoutOffsetLinkedOrientation.description: Specifies the orintation of the linked component to which the offset of this component edge applies.  This can be used for ensuring that a component maintains a specific aspect ratio when it is resized by linking the bottom edge offset of a component to the width of the same component.

LayoutOffsetLinkedlinked.name: Linked To
LayoutOffsetLinkedlinked.description: The component to which this component edge offset is linked.

LayoutOffsetLinkedratio.name: Value
LayoutOffsetLinkedratio.description: The value of this component edge offset, where -1.0 is the top or left of the linked component, and +1.0 is the bottom or right of the linked component.

Menu.description: Menus supporting items of various types, including actions, booleans, multiple-choice, sliders, etc.

colour.name: Selection Colour
colour.description: Colour to use for highlighting selected menu item.

font.name: Font
font.description: Font to use for rendering the menu.

fontSize.name: Font Size
fontSize.description: Size of text when rendering the menu.

shadowOffset.name: Shadow Offset
shadowOffset.description: Offset of the shadow rendered behind the text of the menu.

onExit.name: Action on Exit
onExit.description: Action to perform leaving or dismissing the menu.  This is intended as a kind of "default" action, such as returning to the game from a pause menu

options.name: Menu Item
options.description: Add an item to this menu.

MenuItemActionName.name: Name
MenuItemActionName.description: Unique name of this menu item.

MenuItemActiononSelection.name: On Selection
MenuItemActiononSelection.description: Action to perform upon selecting this action menu item.

MenuItemBooleanName.name: Name
MenuItemBooleanName.description: Unique name of this menu item.

MenuItemBooleanfalseLabel.name: False Label
MenuItemBooleanfalseLabel.description: Label to be shown as the value of this boolean menu item when set to false.

MenuItemBooleantrueLabel.name: True Label
MenuItemBooleantrueLabel.description: Label to be shown as the value of this boolean menu item when set to true.

MenuItemDigitalInputName.name: Name
MenuItemDigitalInputName.description: Unique name of this menu item.

MenuItemDisplayResolutionName.name: Name
MenuItemDisplayResolutionName.description: Unique name of this menu item.

MenuItemFileListName.name: Name
MenuItemFileListName.description: Unique name of this menu item.

MenuItemFileListfolder.name: Folder
MenuItemFileListfolder.description: Folder from which to list files in this menu.

MenuItemFileListuser.name: User
MenuItemFileListuser.description: Determine whether the folder is relative to program data or user data.

MenuItemFileListonSelection.description: Action to perform upon selecting a file.

MenuItemSliderName.name: Name
MenuItemSliderName.description: Unique name of this menu item.

MenuItemSliderminimum.name: Minimum
MenuItemSliderminimum.description: The minimum value of this slider.

MenuItemSlidermaximum.name: Maximum
MenuItemSlidermaximum.description: The maximum value of this slider.

MenuItemSlidersteps.name: Steps
MenuItemSlidersteps.description: The number of steps it takes to traverse from the minimum value of this slider to the maximum value.

MenuItemSlideronChange.name: On Change
MenuItemSlideronChange.description: Action to perform upon changing the value of this slider.

Prompt.description: Prompts that display a message and allow the user to choose between two options, such as cancelling or confirming an action.

selectionColour.name: Selection Colour
selectionColour.description: Colour to use for highlighting selected menu item.

font.name: Font
font.description: Font to use for rendering the menu.

textSize.name: Font Size
textSize.description: Size of text when rendering the menu.

shadowOffset.name: Shadow Offset
shadowOffset.description: Offset of the shadow rendered behind the text of the menu.

message.name: Message
message.description: Message to be displayed by this prompt informing the user of its purpose.

cancelLabel.name: Reject Label
cancelLabel.description: Text to be displayed to indicate the choice to reject this prompt.  Note:  Good practice is to prefer more descriptive texts should as "Don't Save" rather than "Cancel"

confirmLabel.name: Accept Label
confirmLabel.description: Text to be displayed to indicate the choice to accept this prompt.  Note:  Good practice is to prefer more descriptive texts should as "Save Project" rather than "OK"

onCancel.name: On Rejection
onCancel.description: Action to perform upon user selecting the rejection choice.

onConfirm.name: On Acceptance
onConfirm.description: Action to perform upon user selecting the acceptance choice.

ScreenFader.description: Visual elements that fade between two different different visual elements.  This can be used to create nice visual transitions between gameplay and a pause menu, for example.

screenA.name: Screen A
screenA.description: First screen of this screen fader.

screenB.name: Screen B
screenB.description: Second screen of this screen fader.

transition.name: Transition
transition.description: Transition value of this screen fader, from 0 to 1, where 0 only shows screen A and 1 only shows screen B.

Throbber.description: Animated visual elements to indicate that the application is busy.

duration.name: Animation Duration
duration.description: Total duration of the Throbber animation before it loops in milliseconds.

spots.name: Spots
spots.description: Number of spots to animate in this Throbber.

spotSides.name: Spot Sides
spotSides.description: Number of sides on each spot in this throbber.  You can create different spot shapes by specifying different numbers, e.g. 3 for triangles, 4 for squares, etc.

spotRadius.name: Spot Size
spotRadius.description: Maximum size of each spot in this throbber.

shadowOffset.name: Spot Shadow Offset
shadowOffset.description: Offset of the shadow rendered behind the spots of this throbber.

colour.name: Spot Colour
colour.description: Colour of spots in this throbber.

ringRadius.name: Ring Size
ringRadius.description: Size of the ring of spots in this throbber, where a value of +1.0 will place spots at the top edge of the screen.

repetitions.name: Spot Animation Repetitions
repetitions.description: Number of repeating animated patterns in around the throbber ring.

VirtualKeyboard.description: On-screen keyboards that allow the user to enter text without a real keyboard.
